task_description: Implement 4 major features: (1) Ultra-advanced SERP deep analysis with retry logic, enhanced metrics, and dedicated competitor analysis UI. (2) AI cluster content generation from the silo/cluster system. (3) Auto Schema Generator with detection and frontend injection. (4) Internal Link Audit Score with monthly comparison.

verification.summary: All PHP files pass php -l with no syntax errors. admin.js passes node --check. 4 commits made successfully for the 4 features.
